mnemonics: SCAMp: Sockets, CoAP, Asyncio, MQTT, paho-mqtt
keyPoints: paho-mqtt is the primary Python client for the MQTT protocol
The asyncio library is essential for handling asynchronous operations in IoT applications
CoAP (Constrained Application Protocol) is designed for resource-constrained devices
commonMistakes: Confusing MQTT (message broker protocol) with HTTP (request-response protocol)
Not using asynchronous libraries for I/O bound operations, leading to poor performance
Forgetting to handle connection loss and reconnection logic in network clients
